items.name: adapter
items.doc: Adapter layer between the host app and the Slint UI grid/shell.

items.name: bindings
items.doc: Script-engine bindings (Rhai) exposed to configuration scripts.

items.name: docs
items.doc: Markdown parser that converts CommonMark + GFM to `DocBlock` models.

items.name: dsl
items.doc: Composition DSL — fluent builder API for shell and window configuration.

items.name: grid
items.doc: Grid zone model and target-config loader for responsive layouts.

items.name: layout
items.doc: Layout DSL parser, constraint solver, and ratio-based panel engine.

items.name: gateway
items.doc: File I/O gateway — all `std::fs` calls are funnelled through this module.

items.name: pal
items.doc: OS-level window backdrop and composition effects (Mica, Acrylic).

items.name: settings
items.doc: Persistent application settings (zoom, theme, icons, font).

items.name: shell
items.doc: Platform-native window chrome, navigation models, and shell lifecycle.

items.name: view_config
items.doc: Per-view Rhai configuration auto-applied on navigation changes.
